testcase.name: testSendMessage

failure.message: javax.jms.JMSException: Could not connect to broker: ConnectionRefused

testcase.failure: javax.jms.JMSException: Could not connect to broker: ConnectionRefused at org.apache.activemq.transport.tcp.TcpTransport.connect(TcpTransport.java:515) at org.springframework.jms.core.JmsTemplate.execute(JmsTemplate.java:492)

testcase.name: testDateFormatLocale

failure.message: expected:<2023-01-15> but was:<15/01/2023> AssertionError en_US locale formatting mismatch

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected:<2023-01-15> but was:<15/01/2023> AssertionError en_US locale formatting mismatch at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.springframework.format.DateFormatTests.testDateFormatLocale(DateFormatTests.java:45)

testcase.name: testScheduledExecution

failure.message: Task did not complete within expected time

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Task did not complete within expected time at org.springframework.scheduling.SlowTaskTests.testScheduledExecution(SlowTaskTests.java:33)

testcase.name: testPropertyAccess

error.message: Cannot invoke method on null reference

testcase.error: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke method on null reference at org.springframework.beans.BeanWrapperImpl.setPropertyValue(BeanWrapperImpl.java:328) at org.springframework.beans.BeanWrapperTests.testPropertyAccess(BeanWrapperTests.java:72)
